data.body: BASIC investigation complete. ROOT_CAUSE: The ticket CLI sync guard (ticket script lines 90-93) uses git log origin/tickets..tickets to detect local-ahead commits, but this check cannot distinguish between legitimate local-only commits and an unrelated orphan branch from a diverged initial setup. When the local tickets branch is an orphan (different root commit than origin/tickets), the check always finds commits, permanently blocking reset --hard and preserving the stale orphan. Fix: two-phase merge-base check in the sync guard. confidence: high. hypothesis: confirmed via merge-base --is-ancestor analysis.
